content = r.text
        # Look for same store/comparable
        if "same store" in content.lower() or "comparable" in content.lower():
            print(">>> Found store sales data!")
            ss = re.findall(r'.{0,80}same.{0,100}', content, re.IGNORECASE)
            for s in ss[:3]:
                print(f"  {s[:120]}")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"10-K Error: {e}")

# Last resort: use Yahoo Finance earnings page
print("\n=== Yahoo Finance Earnings ===")
yf_url = "https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/FND/financials"
try:
    r = requests.get(yf_url, headers=headers, timeout=20)
    print(f"YF Status: {r.status_code}")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"YF Error: {e}")
